comments.text: The following reference is relevant: Paul Erdős, Tibor Gallai, and Zsolt Tuza. "Covering the cliques of a graph with vertices." Discrete mathematics 108.1-3 (1992): 279-289. https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/0012365X92906815 I believe this problem is "Problem 1" in that text. (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
